meaning: Common Gateway Interface,公共网关接口;Computer Graphics Interface,计算机图形接口
examples: 'Dinosaur' combines CGI animation with live-action location shots.
Recent, more dramatic use of CGI was seen in "Walking With Dinosaurs."
Some actors are concerned that they may lose jobs because of the CGI technology.
Today, the majority of visual effects are achieved through the use of computer-generated imagery (CGI).
And I'm so proud to be in partnership with CGI to make this happen.
